task_text: agent-32-special-request-memory-v0-1 — CRM-lite per-customer preference store. Adds SpecialRequestMemoryConfig (default enabled=False) + CustomerPreference + SpecialRequestMemoryStore schemas + lookup-special-request read-only CLI script (mirrors lookup-prior-leads-by-phone exactly) + SpecialRequestLookup audit variant + integration into parse_catering_inquiry SKILL.md Step 0 (parallel call alongside lookup-prior-leads-by-phone, merges results into extraction priors). Write/update script + owner WhatsApp command deferred to v0.2 (operator hand-edits state file in v0.1; safe_io.atomic_write_json convention is documented but no project-side write script ships). Tests mirror existing lookup-prior-leads tests.
